tracks.title: Modern Frontend UI Engineering
tracks.description: Master React 19, TypeScript, state management, and modern component design.

milestones.title: React Core & Component Architecture
milestones.description: Build responsive interactive interfaces with clean component composition.

resources.title: React & TypeScript Full Course
resources.notes: Learn typed props, useState, useEffect hooks, and component lifecycle.

resources.title: Official React Documentation & Patterns
resources.notes: Study conditional rendering, key props, and state lifting.

resources.title: TanStack Query (React Query) Masterclass
resources.notes: Master async data fetching, caching, invalidation, and optimistic updates.

resources.title: Build a Real-Time Dashboard UI
resources.notes: Construct a responsive dashboard with chart widgets and dark mode.

tracks.title: Scalable Backend & Database Architecture
tracks.description: Design high-performance REST APIs, relational schemas, and authentication systems.

milestones.title: API Design & Relational Persistence
milestones.description: Implement robust server endpoints and database query optimization.

resources.title: Building Production REST APIs
resources.notes: Implement Express/FastAPI routes, middleware, validation, and error handling.

resources.title: Designing Data Intensive Applications
resources.notes: Study database indexing, transactions, and concurrency patterns.

resources.title: PostgreSQL Database Performance Tuning
resources.notes: Learn FOREIGN KEY cascades, indexing strategies, and query EXPLAIN ANALYZE.

resources.title: JWT Auth & Role-Based Access Control Project
resources.notes: Build access token refresh flows, password hashing with bcrypt, and middleware guards.

tracks.title: DevOps & Cloud Deployment
tracks.description: Containerize full-stack apps and automate CI/CD cloud deployments.

milestones.title: Containerization & Cloud Launch
milestones.description: Package services into Docker containers and deploy to cloud platforms.

resources.title: Docker & Docker Compose Full Course
resources.notes: Write multi-stage Dockerfiles and compose web, api, and database containers.

resources.title: GitHub Actions CI/CD Pipeline Automation
resources.notes: Automate unit testing, docker build pushes, and cloud deployments.
